character.name: Anthropomorphic small fluffy songbird creature, NO ARMS — tiny folded wings tucked against fluffy round body. Very round fluffy body like a fat sparrow puffed up in cold weather. Small sharp pointed beak, big expressive round eyes, cheerful alert expression. Prominent fluffy feathered crest swept backward by wind on top of head. Teal (#0D9B8E) feathers covering head, back, wings, crest, tail feathers fanning outward. Pale silver-white (#D4DDE1) face cheek patches and wing tips. Soft cream (#F5EDE3) round fluffy chest and belly. Small thin bird legs with tiny feet. Fluffy round body with visible tail feathers — NOT a penguin, NOT upright posture, NOT flippers, body tilts slightly forward like a perched bird. Cozy indie pixel art style, Pokémon Gen 3 starter readability, Stardew Valley warmth. Limited palette ~10 colors, no anti-aliasing, crisp 1-bit outlines, black outline color, transparent background, front-facing, 48 pixel height.
